terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to MyFinPro. By accessing or using our personal and family finance management application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully before using the service.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account or using MyFinPro, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.content: MyFinPro is a personal and family finance management application that allows you to track income, expenses, and budgets. The service is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.

registration.title: 3. Account Registration & Security
registration.content: You may register using email and password, Google OAuth, or Telegram Login. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

responsibilities.title: 4. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content: You agree to provide accurate information, use the service lawfully, and not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts or systems. You are solely responsible for the financial data you enter into the application.

ownership.title: 5. Data & Content Ownership
ownership.content: You retain ownership of all financial data you enter into MyFinPro. We do not claim any ownership rights over your content. You grant us a limited license to store and process your data solely to provide the service.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: MyFinPro is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any financial decisions made based on information displayed in the application. This service is not a substitute for professional financial advice.

modifications.title: 7. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 8. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us through the application's support channels.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how MyFinPro collects, uses, and protects your personal and financial information.

infoCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollect.content: We collect information you provide during registration (name, email address), financial data you enter (transactions, budgets, income, expenses), and authentication data from third-party providers (Google OAuth, Telegram Login).

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.content: We use your information to provide and improve the finance management service, authenticate your identity, display your financial data, and send important account notifications such as email verification.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage & Security
storage.content: Your data is stored on secured servers. Passwords are encrypted using industry-standard hashing algorithms. Authentication tokens are securely managed. We implement appropriate technical measures to protect your information.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: MyFinPro integrates with Google OAuth and Telegram Login for authentication. When you use these services, their respective privacy policies also apply. We only receive basic profile information necessary for account creation.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies & Local Storage
cookies.content: We use local storage to manage JWT authentication tokens for maintaining your session. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics cookies.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention & Deletion
retention.content: You may request account deletion at any time. Upon deletion request, your account enters a 30-day grace period during which you can cancel the deletion. After the grace period, all your data is permanently and irreversibly deleted.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data. You can view and update your account information from the settings page. You can request full account deletion at any time.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: MyFinPro is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with their data, please contact us.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: 10. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, please contact us through the application's support channels.

help.title: How to Use MyFinPro
help.subtitle: A step-by-step guide to getting the most out of your personal finance manager.

createAccount.title: Creating an Account
createAccount.content: You can sign up for MyFinPro using one of three methods: email and password, Google sign-in, or Telegram Login. Visit the registration page and choose your preferred method.

verifyEmail.title: Verifying Your Email
verifyEmail.content: After registering with email, you will receive a verification email. Click the link in the email to verify your account. You can resend the verification email from the banner at the top of the page.

loggingIn.title: Logging In
loggingIn.content: Go to the sign-in page and enter your credentials, or use Google or Telegram to log in. After successful authentication you will be redirected to the dashboard.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.content: From the Account Settings page you can view your profile information, change your default currency and timezone, and update your password.

socialAccounts.title: Connecting Social Accounts
socialAccounts.content: You can connect Google and Telegram to your account for easier sign-in. Go to the Connected Accounts section in your settings to link or unlink providers.

deleteAccount.title: Deleting Your Account
deleteAccount.content: If you wish to delete your account, go to Account Settings and click Delete Account. Your account will enter a 30-day grace period during which you can cancel the deletion. After 30 days, all data is permanently removed.

overview.title: Dashboard Overview
overview.content: The dashboard is your central hub for viewing your financial data at a glance. Financial tracking features including transactions, budgets, and reports are coming soon.

currency.title: Changing Default Currency
currency.content: Go to Account Settings and find the Preferences section. Select your preferred currency from the dropdown and click Save. All new transactions will default to this currency.

timezone.title: Changing Timezone
timezone.content: In the Preferences section of Account Settings, select your timezone from the dropdown. This affects how dates and times are displayed throughout the application.

language.title: Changing Language
language.content: Use the language switcher in the top-right corner of the page to switch between English and Hebrew. The interface will update immediately, including right-to-left layout for Hebrew.

strongPassword.title: Strong Password Recommendations
strongPassword.content: Use a password that is at least 8 characters long and includes uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and numbers. Avoid using the same password across multiple sites.

keepSecure.title: Keeping Your Account Secure
keepSecure.content: Never share your password with anyone. If you use a shared computer, make sure to log out after each session. Consider connecting a social account as a backup sign-in method.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgotPassword.content: Go to the <link>forgot password page</link> to request a password reset link. You will receive an email with instructions to set a new password.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.content: If you need assistance or have questions, please reach out to our support team at support@myfinpro.com. We aim to respond within 24 hours.

delete.title: Delete payment
delete.description: This payment is shared across multiple scopes. Choose what to remove.
delete.scopeAll: Delete from all my accessible scopes ({count})

propagate.title: Apply changes to occurrences?
propagate.description: This recurring payment has generated occurrences. Choose how far this change should reach.
propagate.destructiveWarning: This change rebuilds future occurrences and may discard their comments and attachments.

self.label: This payment only
self.description: Update just this recurring payment. Occurrences stay as they are.

future.label: This and future occurrences
future.description: Update this payment and every occurrence dated from now onward.

all.label: All occurrences
all.description: Update this payment and every occurrence, past and future.

propagate.resultUpdated: Updated payment and {count, plural, =0 {no occurrences} =1 {# occurrence} other {# occurrences}}.
propagate.resultSkipped: {count, plural, =1 {# occurrence in a group you don't manage was} other {# occurrences in groups you don't manage were}} left unchanged.

form.loadError: Could not refresh payment data. Showing the last known values.

every.label: Every
every.minHelp: Minimum 1 minute. Month is approximated as 30 days; for exact calendar months use a cron expression.

cron.label: Cron expression
cron.help: Standard 5-field cron (minute hour dom month dow). Examples: 0 9 * * 1 = weekday 9 AM, 0 0 1 * * = first of month, */15 * * * * = every 15 minutes.

form.typeChangeWarning: Changing type will remove the schedule and stop generating new occurrences. Already-generated payments stay.

validation.everyMsTooSmall: Interval must be at least 1 minute.
validation.endsAtBeforeStart: End date must be after start date.
validation.specRequired: Provide either an interval or a cron expression.

badge.title: Schedule
badge.cancelConfirmBody: Cancel this schedule permanently? Existing occurrences are kept; no new ones will be generated.

plan.cancelConfirmBody: Cancel this plan permanently? Remaining pending payments will be marked cancelled; nothing is deleted.

form.principalHint: The amount above is the plan's principal; each payment is derived from it.

validation.equalRequiresZeroRate: The equal method is interest-free — set the rate to 0 or pick the annuity method
